arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp bigs up Celtic and tells O'Riley he's a superfan as Alan Shearer joins the love in
arts.sum: The leading pundit spoke to the playmaker after his ice-cool winner against Manchester City

arts.ttl: Watch what Matt O'Riley almost did at full time after Brighton's win, Celtic fans will instantly recognise it
arts.sum: Celtic beating RB Leipzig is, quite rightly, the highlight of the week for every Hoops supporter but it seems that Matt O’Riley has put the icing on the cake with his return to action for Brighton this weekend. Celtic hero, O’Riley, popped up with Brighton’s winner against Man City last night after he made his Premier League debut for the seaside club.

arts.ttl: Brentford keen on Celtic winger Kuhn - gossip
arts.sum: English Premier League club consider Celtic winger as replacement for star asset as atmosphere turns sour at struggling Hibs...

arts.ttl: David Moyes makes claim about watching Celtic after Roy Keane rant
arts.sum: David Moyes and Roy Keane discuss teams playing out from the back But Keane looked towards the negative side and stated that it was ‘absolute madness’ Leipzig were trying to beat players from the edge of their box just before half-time, as he told the Overlap.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans 'greetin' at Matt O'Riley's botched Brighton celebration as muscle memory kicks in for Parkhead hero
arts.sum: The Denmark international was on top of the world at the final whistle and returned to his Parkhead roots

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer gush about Celtic 'talent' who was 'gliding past players' vs RB Leipzig
arts.sum: The Champions League win over RB Leipzig at Celtic Park was probably one of the best performances of the season by a Brendan Rodgers team so far. And it was a performance that really made Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer sit up and take notice of Celtic hero Nicolas Kuhn.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton fires shots Celtic fans will love as Matt O'Riley's Brighton goal downs Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Celtic hero Chris Sutton dubs the Premier League the ‘Farmer’s League’ after Matt O’Riley’s goal Even the Celtic fans were cheering on with delight when O’Riley took a brilliant touch, was through on goal and then slotted the ball past Ederson to help Brighton inflict a fourth consecutive defeat on Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Peak Brendan Rodgers has Celtic dabbling in the unforeseen and it's time to deal in their biggest asset – Hugh Keevins
arts.sum: Rodgers would have been entitled to throw in a congratulatory mention for himself amid a brilliant run.

arts.ttl: I dreamed of nights like Celtic Champions League epic so a little ankle sprain wasn't going to spoil it
arts.sum: The USA defender picked up an early knock against RB Leipzig but battled through it

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk mocks opponent as Liverpool captain and ex Celtic star left mortified by Aston Villa penalty shout
arts.sum: Liverpool opened up a five point lead at the top of the Premier League with a 2-0 victory against Aston Villa at Anfield.
